Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, I forgot to mention. During lunch break today, that girl was trying to bother me again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You remember, right? She's the one who put gum on my shoe locker.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 2 25 25}Well this time, I told her what I thought right to her face. That she should find what she really wants to do in life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}She probably didn't get what I was saying, but ever since I figured it out for myself, I feel like I've been able to see the bigger picture.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}I mean, I kinda used to be the same as her, you know? I guess I've learned how to empathize better now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Not to mention, you did end up becoming my boyfriend, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But uh, that's not what why I invited you here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}I guess I could've told you this next part at school, but I wanted to talk somewhere quiet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Hmmm, sort of? Oh, but it's not serious or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}D-Don't be so impatient! I'm getting to that. Oh, why am I the one panicking now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}So you know the kids we coached?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I know they were kind of a handful, but they also have an endearing side to them, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 0 25 25}Sometimes I can't believe how open-minded you are... I think I need to learn from you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But I know you were always looking out for them. I think you'd make a pretty good coach, actually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I got (ITEM NAME)![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}The kids told me to "give it to my boyfriend"... Aren't they cute?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}That's what I invited you here for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Well, actually, that was just an excuse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}...I-I just mean, you can stretch out and relax! We won't get yelled at for being too noisy. H-Haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}D-Don't make me say it! I am a girl, you know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}H-Hey, don't stare so much. I know my face is all red...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}It's just... I was able to find my true calling thanks to you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Those are my true feelings, and I hope you feel the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko has expressed her love for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Strength Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Atavaka{f 0 1 27}, the wisdom king general![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a special evening with Yuko.[n]{f 1 1}
